result.stdout:
Description:
  Markdown to Word Converter - Converts Markdown files with Mermaid diagrams to professional Word documents.

Usage:
  md2word [options]

Options:
  -i, --input <input> (REQUIRED)    Full path to the input markdown file
  -o, --output <output> (REQUIRED)  Full path where the .docx file will be saved
  -t, --template <template>         Full path to the Word template (.docx)
  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Markdown to Word Converter - Converts Markdown files with Mermaid diagrams to professional Word documents.

  --version                         Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                    Show help and usage information
